progress_empty: Start reading — your progress will appear here.
search_downloading: Downloading Quran text for offline search…
about_lede: Tadabbur (تدبر) is the Quran's own word for reading it the way it asks to be read: slowly, attentively, letting each verse actually land. This app is built for that kind of reading.
feat_offline_b: Text, translations, and three tafsirs install once (~6 MB) and live on your device. Airplane mode welcome.
feat_words_b: Select any Arabic word or phrase to see exactly what it means.
feat_audio_b: Gapless surah audio from seven reciters, with the recited word highlighted as you listen.
feat_tafsir_b: Ibn Kathir (abridged), Tafsir Kemenag, Al-Mukhtasar, and As-Sa'di — one tap under any verse.
feat_themes_b: Six complete themes, four Arabic typefaces, adjustable text size.
feat_keyboard_b: Keyboard-first on desktop, bottom navigation on your phone, instant surah switching on both.
src_quran_b: Uthmani script from the quran.com library.
src_tafsir_b: Tafsir Ibn Kathir (abridged, English), Tafsir Kemenag (Indonesian), Al-Mukhtasar fi at-Tafsir, and Tafsir As-Sa'di.
src_audio_b: Streamed from quran.com's audio library, with word-level timings.
about_open_body: Tadabbur is free and open source. Star the repo, report an issue, or contribute.
roadmap_lede: Where Tadabbur is heading. Have an idea or found a problem? Open an issue on GitHub.
rm_tafsir: Three tafsir sources under every verse
rm_offline: Offline-first: the whole Quran installs in one visit
rm_themes: Six themes and four Arabic typefaces
rm_search: On-device search across Arabic text and translations
rm_sync: Sign in to sync notes, bookmarks, and progress across devices
rm_hifz: Hifz mode: record your recitation and check it against the mushaf
setup_body: Downloading the Quran and tafsir so everything opens instantly, even offline. This happens once.
settings_offline_hint: The Quran text, translations, and tafsir are stored on this device so reading works with no connection.
offline_storage_used: {size} MB used by Tadabbur on this device
offline_error: Couldn’t update offline data. Check your connection and try again.
search_hint: Searches translation and Arabic text, fully on-device
notes_soon: Write reflections on any verse and find them here. Coming soon with sign-in, so your notes follow you across devices.
settings_language_hint: Also selects the translation and tafsir sources.
settings_reciter_hint: Voice used for verse and surah playback. Tap play to hear a sample.
settings_theme_hint: Six complete looks. Night is pure black — easiest on the eyes in the dark.
settings_arabic_font_hint: The typeface used for Quran text throughout the app.
settings_note: Sign-in, notes and progress sync are coming soon. Your preferences are saved on this device.
tafsir_none: No tafsir available for this verse.
tafsir_error: Could not load tafsir. Check your connection.
info_bismillah_no: This surah does not open with Bismillah.
info_sources: Text: Uthmani script. Translation: Saheeh International. Tafsir: Ibn Kathir (Abridged).
home_tagline: Read, reflect and take your time with the Quran — with translation and tafsir alongside the Uthmani text.
continue_reading: Pick up where you left off
